description.value:
Starting at 1st level, you begin to spread your presence and reputation as a Geisha, making people speak highly of you wherever you go.
During downtime, you can work as a Geisha and get paid for it. Not only that, but you can also "sow rumors" (Team 7 - Kakashi's Logbook on Kage Strategy) for free during your working time, using your performance for this activity.
The following table is indicative; the DM can modify it based on their needs and world settings:

  • D rank – DC 14 – Duration: 2 DT – 500 Ryo
  • C rank – DC 17 – Duration: 4 DT – 1200 Ryo
  • B rank – DC 21 – Duration: 8 DT – 2750 Ryo
  • A rank – DC 25 – Duration: 10 DT – 3850 Ryo
  • S rank – DC 28 – Duration: 12 DT – 5100 Ryo

At level 7, you gain access to a special case that allows you to create items using unique reagents known only to the Geisha clan.
This special case can produce consumables (pills, tools, poisons, etc.) of any type up to a total value of 50 Ryo per level.
The items you create can range in rarity, with greater rarity available at level 5, superior rarity at level 10, and supreme rarity at level 15.

Additionally, the special case can create simple weapons or ammo. These items will only last for the day, as they are made from materials that deteriorate afterwards.
Once the amount of Ryo used has been expended, the special case needs a full rest to recharge with the necessary reagents.
